name: recall_vault_seal_maps_sc28
description: RECALL case — expected to FAIL pre-RAG-rewrite. Real eMASS BoE file under 10.SC/: a script(1) capture of `vault status` showing a sealed/auto-unseal HashiCorp Vault. Encrypted secret storage at rest is SC-28 (Protection of Information at Rest); the seal/unseal key management is SC-12 (Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management). Body has NO control ID / CCI / doc number; Vault vocabulary ('Sealed false', 'Seal Type awskms', 'Unseal Progress') has near-zero overlap with 'protection of information at rest'. Current tagger → zero tags. Distractor IA-5 present as precision guard.

objectives.text: The information system protects the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Encrypt stored secrets and sensitive data at rest.

objectives.text: The organization establishes and manages cryptographic keys for required cryptography employed within the information system.
objectives.implementation_guidance: Manage key establishment, storage, and rotation.

objectives.text: The information system enforces password complexity.

evidence.title: Vault seal status capture
evidence.text:
Script started on 2026-03-11 10:15:00-0500
[root@app01 ~]# vault status
Key                      Value
---                      -----
Seal Type                awskms
Recovery Seal Type       shamir
Initialized              true
Sealed                   false
Total Recovery Shares    5
Threshold                3
Version                  1.15.2
Storage Type             raft
HA Enabled               true
HA Mode                  active
[root@app01 ~]# vault secrets list
Path          Type         Description
----          ----         -----------
kv/           kv           key/value store
transit/      transit      encryption as a service
[root@app01 ~]# exit
Script done on 2026-03-11 10:15:39-0500
